name: Necropsy and Cause-of-Death Review
preprompt: Define standardized necropsy procedures for mice at death or humane endpoint, including tissue collection, gross pathology, sample preservation, and optional histology. Include a rule for adjudicating cause of death or major terminal pathology when possible.
tooling: Read: own data, TOCs and summaries of all other components. Write: own data only.
summary: Captures terminal pathology and biospecimens for interpretation. Helps distinguish survival effects from possible treatment-related adverse events.
